description: China warns the US against unchecked military AI use, fearing a "Terminator"-like future. Beijing advocates for human control over AI in warfare and opposes using technological leads for dominance. The US military reportedly uses AI extensively for intelligence, targeting, and logistics in operations against Iran and Venezuela.

The company has invested significantly in reskilling its workforce to adapt to these evolving workplace technologies.

description: The San Francisco 49ers are strongly linked to signing veteran defensive end Joey Bosa. He may play alongside his younger brother, Nick Bosa, who is also a defensive end. While Joey’s experience and talent are undeniable, his age and the 49ers’ 2026 strategy of preferring younger talent could become potential obstacles to a right priced deal. Else, the fans and analysts have always wanted to brothers play for one team.

description: There are five regions in the world, from Sardinia in Italy to Okinawa in Japan, where people regularly live beyond 100 years, remaining healthy, active and mentally sharp.

title: Taylor Swift’s $2B news signals power future with Travis Kelce
description: Travis Kelce has confirmed he will return to the Kansas City Chiefs for another NFL season, signing a one year deal reportedly worth up to $15 million. The veteran tight end says his decision was driven by his continued love for football. Kelce also credited Taylor Swift’s passion for her craft as inspiration. With the couple expected to marry before training camp, both stars remain committed to thriving in their respective careers rather than slowing down.

title: Fact check: Is Travis Hunter paying $150K monthly to wife Leanna Lenee?
description: Travis Hunter, the Jacksonville Jaguars star player, and his wife, Leanna Lenee, have been married for less than a year and have already found themselves involved in a scandalous debate after rumors of the star player being cheated on by his newly wed wife sparked chaos. Amid this, a clip of Travis Hunter allegedly saying he has to pay her a massive amount monthly to her has sparked chaos.

title: When AI firms become power firms, should governments foot the bill?
description: While Washington’s approach — at least rhetorically — is that hyperscalers should eventually finance their own power supply, India’s current approach appears to be the opposite
